news.title: gazans living under hamas rule are beginning to break their silence, describing sexual abuse by mult
news.summary:
gazans living under hamas rule are beginning to break their silence, describing sexual abuse by multiple men, sexual blackmail for aid or money and abuse by people in positions of power.

human rights organisations in gaza say that up to 60,000 women are vulnerable, with reports also indicating a rise in child marriages and pregnancies. 

jusoor news filmed rare video testimonies inside the strip. the filming was done at great risk because speaking up in gaza carries severe risk. 

in one account told by a male gazan, whose identity has to remain anonymous for his safety, he described how he found a widow displaced in the war being molested inside a tent by 'a bunch of' hamas members and was warned to stay silent.

'we were contacted by the wife of a friend. she had asked a qassam brigades commander to help her, but he took advantage of her,' he said.

'his behaviour is disgraceful. we investigated the matter and found her in a tent in the gharabli area where a bunch of qassam members were taking advantage of her. 

'we informed the leadership but we were told we had to keep silent about it.'

the izz ad-din al-qassam brigades is the military arm of hamas.

another gazan man confirmed that a similar episode had happened with one of his female neighbours, who was blackmailed by 'one of hamas’s charity organisations… they wanted her to wh*** herself in 거래소 for a food parcel, or an aid voucher, or 100 shekels'.

source: jusoor news

news.title:
aave sees $5.4b ETH outflows as rsETH exploit raises concerns

according to lookonchain, the kelp da
news.summary:
aave sees $5.4b ETH outflows as rsETH exploit raises concerns

according to lookonchain, the kelp dao exploit has left aave saddled with bad debt after the attacker deposited rsETH to drain ETH. this has sparked a massive whale exodus, with over $5.4 billion fleeing the protocol in a panic. justin sun alone yanked 65,584 ETH (~$154m) from the platform. driven by this mass flight, aave's ETH utilization rate has now maxed out at 100%.

news.summary:
russia’s largest bank sberbank prepares for 암호화폐 trading rollout

according to tass, sberbank is ready to offer 암호화폐currency trading services once regulation and organized 거래소 trading are introduced, senior vice president ruslan vesterovsky said at a moscow 거래소 forum.

he said 거래소-based trading could improve liquidity and tighten spreads, adding that existing financial infrastructure can support services such as margin trading and ai-driven investment strategies.

news.summary: according to @d2_finance's analysis, the root cause of the nearly $300 million attack on kelp dao's rsETH cross-chain bridge has been confirmed on-chain: a trust issue with oapp nodes caused by the leakage of private keys on the source chain.

news.title:
kelp dao rsETH bridge exploit drains ~$292m, aave freezes rsETH markets

kelp dao’s rsETH cross-chai
news.summary:
kelp dao rsETH bridge exploit drains ~$292m, aave freezes rsETH markets

kelp dao’s rsETH cross-chain bridge was exploited, with approximately 116,500 rsETH drained via layerzero-related contract calls, valued at about $292 million at current prices; the protocol paused core contracts, blocking further attempts, and is investigating with layerzero and unichain, while aave has frozen rsETH markets and is assessing potential bad debt.

news.title:
🇮🇱 israelis are 연준 up

police broke up anti-netanyahu protests in jerusalem, calling for an end to t
news.summary:
🇮🇱 israelis are 연준 up

police broke up anti-netanyahu protests in jerusalem, calling for an end to the constant wars.

video
  




mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🚨🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱 the wall street journal just dropped a bombshell report on the inside story of the iran war...

the key revelations:

트럼프 used to call the middle east "blood and sand" and wanted nothing to do with it. 

then netanyahu gave him a "persuasive february briefing" in the situation room, backed by repeated calls from lindsey graham, and 트럼프 changed his mind. 

he thought it would be as easy as venezuela.

트럼프 was "in awe" of the scale of the bombs, watching clips of explosions every morning. 

but he did "little to sell the american public on the war" and grew frustrated when he didn't get praised for it.

his own team showed him midterm polling that proved the war was dragging down republican candidates. 

he "quickly began ruminating on how the military action could turn into a catastrophe."

on the strait: 트럼프 told his team before the war that iran would "likely capitulate before closing the strait." 

his advisers were "caught off guard" that tanker traffic stopped so quickly. 

트럼프 later "marveled at the ease with which the strait was closed," saying "a guy with a drone can shut it down."

by late march, before the f-15 was even shot down, 트럼프 ordered his team to find a way to start talks. 

the war was already over in his mind weeks before the ceasefire.

his aides begged him to stop doing impromptu interviews because he was contradicting himself publicly. 

he agreed to stop, then went right back to calling reporters.

the april 1 address to the nation was susie wiles' idea to "reassure the country 트럼프 had a plan." 

트럼프 didn't want to do it because, in his own words, he couldn't declare victory and didn't know where it was going.

this report paints a picture of a president who was talked into a war by netanyahu and graham, realized it was a mistake within weeks, spent the rest of the conflict looking for the exit, and was frustrated that nobody would give him credit along the way.

the war was an impulse, SOLd by an ally with different objectives, enabled by advisers who couldn't say no, and sustained by a president who was too proud to admit the mistake until the economy forced his hand.







— https://nitter.net/marionawfal/status/2045730320591229422#m

yet, saturday has
news.summary:
12 hours ago, president 트럼프 said he would have "some information by end of day."

yet, saturday has officially ended without any deal announcement and complete silence from both iran and the us.

meanwhile, the anticipated peace talks between the us and iran on sunday were never scheduled and the strait of hormuz is closed again.

in 18 hours, us 주식시장 and oil futures will reopen.

we expect an eventful sunday ahead.

news.title: 속보: the 연준eral reserve reported an operating loss of -$18.7 billion in 2025, marking its 3rd consecu
news.summary:
속보: the 연준eral reserve reported an operating loss of -$18.7 billion in 2025, marking its 3rd consecutive annual loss.

this brings the total 3-year loss to -$210.3 billion after the -$77.6 billion recorded in 2024 and -$114.0 billion in 2023.

the losses are primarily driven by the 연준 paying out more in interest to banks and money market funds than it earns from its bond and mbs holdings.

since the losses began in september 2022, the 연준 has stopped remitting income to the treasury department, ending a streak that totaled +$1.36 trillion since 2008.

however, the 연준 cannot become inSOLvent because it quite lite랠리 creates its own money.

truly incredible.

news.title:
wealth inequality in the us has never been wider:

the real wealth of the top 0.001% of us household
news.summary:
wealth inequality in the us has never been wider:

the real wealth of the top 0.001% of us households has grown +3,500% since 1976.

at the same time, 인플레이션-adjusted wealth of the top 0.01% and 0.1% has 급등d +2,200% and +1,200%, respectively.

by comparison, the average household has seen just a +200% increase.

as a result, there are now ~430,000 households worth $30 million or more, with ~74,000 worth over $100 million.

meanwhile, ~72% of wealth for the top 0.1% is concentrated in corporate equities, mutual funds, and private businesses.

to put this into perspective, the bottom 50% of us households had more debt than assets for nearly 2 decades, with their average wealth turning positive after the 2020 pandemic, following stimulus checks and growing home values.

asset owners are the only winners.

news.title:
us semiconductor etfs are attracting massive inflows:

the semiconductor etfs, $smh, and $soxx, have
news.summary:
us semiconductor etfs are attracting massive inflows:

the semiconductor etfs, $smh, and $soxx, have posted a record +$4 billion in inflows so far in april.

this is already above the full month record inflow set in december 2025, at +$3 billion.

this also follows a record -$1.9 billion outflow posted in march.

investors have now been net buyers of us semiconductor etfs in 7 out of the last 8 months, the best streak since 2023.

by comparison, these funds saw 8 consecutive monthly inflows in 2020 and 2023.

investors are piling into semiconductor stocks at a record pace.

news.title:
us stocks are experiencing a historic 랠리:

the S&P 500 closed over +3% higher for its 3rd consecutiv
news.summary:
us stocks are experiencing a historic 랠리:

the S&P 500 closed over +3% higher for its 3rd consecutive week, matching the streak last seen in june 2020.

in the past, comparable runs were also recorded in september 1982 and september 1940.

the only two longer streaks were posted in the 1930s.

the S&P 500 has also finished positive in 12 of the last 13 trading sessions.

meanwhile, the magnificent 7 index has closed higher for 15 consecutive trading sessions, rising +19% over this time.

market momentum is reaching extreme levels.

news.title:
미국이 이란 연계 선박에 대한 승선·수색·나포 단속을 글로벌 해역으로 확대하려는 움직임입니다.

이란 선박뿐 아니라 제재 대상 선박, 다크 플릿,
그리고 이를 활용하는 일부 수요까
news.summary:
미국이 이란 연계 선박에 대한 승선·수색·나포 단속을 글로벌 해역으로 확대하려는 움직임입니다.

이란 선박뿐 아니라 제재 대상 선박, 다크 플릿,
그리고 이를 활용하는 일부 수요까지 단속 대상에 포함될 가능성이 있습니다.

이는 단순한 봉쇄를 넘어, 선박 자체를 기준으로 통제하는 단계로 해석됩니다.

규칙은 이미 만들어졌고,
이제는 실제로 집행이 시작되는 구간입니다.

개호로무즈 타임라인 (미국 동부시간 기준)  

<금요일 낮>  

이란 외무장관 아바스 아라그치는 금요일, 해협이 상업 교통에 대해 '완전히 열려 있다'고 밝힘.     

이어 트럼프 대통령은 트루스소셜에 “호르무즈 해협은 완전히 개방되어 있으며 영업 준비가 되어 있고 전면 통행이 가능하다”고 글 씀.  약 한 시간 뒤 “이란은 다시는 호르무즈 해협을 폐쇄하지 않기로 합의했다”고 덧붙임.     

라이언 쏭, 이러한 주장에 의문 및 경계감 제기.   
고노고, 다음 주엔 빤쓰 입어 시전.   
위성 사진 업체 케플러, 호르무즈 해협이 '아직도 사실상 폐쇄된 상태'라고 언급    

<금요일 밤, 미장 종료>  

이슬람혁명수비대(irgc)는 금요일 늦게 상업 선박은 해군의 허가가 있어야만 통과할 수 있다고 엄포.  irgc와 연계된 매체들은 이란 외무장관의 발표를 비웃음, 이는 이란 정권 내부에서 이 결정에 대해 분열이 있음을 보여줌.     

고노고, "입어" 트윗 발사  

<토요일 낮> 
이란 군 대변인은 토요일 해협이 “이전 상태로 돌아갔다”고 협박.  여전히 “군의 엄격한 관리와 통제 하에 있다”고 위협.  호르무즈를 통과하기 위해 줄을 서 있던 약 20척의 선박은 오만 방향으로 되돌아가고 감.   

선박 추적 컨설팅 업체 보스포러스 옵저버는 “irgc가 외무장관이 하는 일을 사실상 거부하고 있다.  이보다 더 분명할 수는 없다”고 언급.    

트럼프 대통령은 토요일 아침 백악관에서 기자들에게 “그들은 다시 해협을 닫으려고 했다, 수년간 해왔던 것처럼”이라며 “그들은 우리를 협박할 수 없다”고 발표.     

<토요일 오후>  
영국 해사 당국은 오만 인근에서 한 선박이 이란의 사격을 받았고, 또 다른 선박이 해협에서 발사체에 맞았다는 보고를 받았다고 발표.  미 정부 관계는 미군이 상업 선박에 대한 최소 세 건의 이란 공격을 파악 중이라고 말함.   

irgc는 미국이 이란 선박과 항구에 대한 해상 봉쇄를 해제할 때까지 선박 운항에 대한 제한을 유지할 것이라고 주장함.   

<토요일 밤, 현재> 
(루머) 트럼프, 백악관 긴급 상황실 회의 소집.  
밴스, 루비오, 헤그세스, 베센트, 와일스, 윗코프, 래트클리프, 케인 등등 국가안보 내각 총출동 한 것으로 전해짐.

news.title: the islamic action front, the political arm of the muslim brotherhood in jordan, has announced it wi
news.summary:
the islamic action front, the political arm of the muslim brotherhood in jordan, has announced it will change its name to “national party” at the request of the central election commission.

it is currently the largest party in parliament, but lacks power.

jordan banned the muslim brotherhood last year after discovering terrorist cells linked to the brotherhood, but its political wing has been allowed to continue its work.

however, party members are under strong pressure from general intelligence directorate raids and investigations into some members accused of money laundering and financial crimes.

jordan is a constitutional monarchy where the executive power is held by the king.

the parliament still has a political role to play, but is secondary to the monarch, who nominates the prime minister.

people of palestinian origin constitute around 60% of the population, many of which vote for the islamic action front.

the original population, meaning the arabs who lived in the east bank before 1948, seldomly vote for the muslim brotherhood party. they usually support the king and various parties and independent mp allied with the monarchy.

this political reality has been entrenched since the black september events of 1970, when palestinian refugees tried to establish a “state-within-a-state” and overthrow the jordanian monarchy.

the conflict ended in 1971, with the plo being expelled and moving to lebanon, resulting in the start of a civil war there instead.

news.title: the wall street journal reports that the u.s. navy is preparing to start boarding and seizing irania
news.summary:
the wall street journal reports that the u.s. navy is preparing to start boarding and seizing iranian-linked sanctioned oil tankers in international waters across the world.

the operations would start over the next couple of days if the ceasefire ends without a deal.

news.title: on april 18th 1983, the organization which would later name itself hezbollah carried out a suicide b
news.summary:
on april 18th 1983, the organization which would later name itself hezbollah carried out a suicide bombing attack against the u.s. embassy in beirut, 63 people, including 17 americans.

a suicide bomber drove a chevrolet van packed with 2,000 pounds of explosives into the embassy.

the blast destroyed much of the front of the seven-story building.

63 people were killed, among them 17 americans (including several cia officers and a journalist).

the perpetrator was from the islamic jihad organization (ijo) but the real responsibility was with hezbollah and the islamic regime in iran. 

the islamic jihad organization was an early cover name and operational arm for what became hezbollah.

hezbollah itself did not publicly announce its existence until 1985, so it often operated under the ijo name in the early 1980s for plausible deniability.

u.s. investigations and intelligence assessments later attributed the attack to hezbollah, with direct support, financing, and direction from iran (via the islamic revolutionary guard corps and ministry of intelligence). 

hezbollah has historically denied direct responsibility for the 1983 embassy bombing and the related october 1983 marine barracks bombing in which 241 u.s. SOLdiers and 58 french SOLdiers were killed, but u.s. government assessments, declassified intelligence and expert analyses all say ijo attacks to hezbollah’s emerging network and their backers in tehran.

news.summary:
anger in italy after an illegal immigrant from africa was filmed killing and trying to cook a cat on a makeshift grate near a children’s playground in la spezia. 

the police intervened quickly, charging him with animal cruelty after 알림s from shocked onlookers
